# Wenzhou Shengda Footwear Co., Ltd. (温州盛达鞋业有限公司)

> Professional children's footwear manufacturer since 2004, based in Wenzhou, Zhejiang, China.

## Company Overview

Wenzhou Shengda Footwear Co., Ltd. is a modern children's footwear enterprise integrating design & development, manufacturing, and brand operation. Founded in 2004, with over 20 years of expertise in kids' shoe manufacturing.

- **Founded:** 2004
- **Location:** No. 9 Liming Road, Oubei, Wenzhou, Zhejiang, China (浙江省温州市瓯北黎明路9号)
- **Industry:** Children's Footwear Manufacturing
- **Annual Production:** 10,000,000+ pairs
- **Cooperative Clients:** 500+

## Our Brands

### Magic Feifei (神童菲菲)
Trendy kids' footwear brand targeting fashion-forward children. Known for bold designs combining street style with comfort.

### Tutu Duck (图图小黄鸭)
Playful and colorful footwear for toddlers and young children. Emphasizes safety, comfort, and fun designs.

### Migu Rabbit (咪咕兔)
Elegant and gentle footwear for girls. Features princess-style designs with quality craftsmanship.

## Product Categories

- Sports shoes (运动鞋)
- Casual shoes (休闲鞋)
- Princess shoes (公主鞋)
- Toddler shoes (学步鞋)
- Sandals (凉鞋)
- Boots (靴子)
- School shoes (校园鞋)

## Core Capabilities

1. **Design & R&D** — In-house design team tracking global kids' fashion trends
2. **Quality Manufacturing** — Eco-friendly materials, strict quality control at every stage
3. **Brand Operation** — Three proprietary brands covering different age groups and styles

## Contact Information

- **Phone:** +86 136 7658 2993
- **Email:** wzshengdaxieye@163.com
- **Address:** No. 9 Liming Road, Oubei, Wenzhou, Zhejiang, China
- **Website:** https://www.shengdakids.com
- **Trend Site:** https://www.shengdakids.com/trend/

## Business Philosophy

"Quality First, Customer Supreme" — From raw material procurement to finished product delivery, every step is strictly controlled to ensure each pair of shoes is as soft and safe as a mother's embrace.

## Why Choose Shengda

- 20+ years of specialized children's footwear manufacturing experience
- Annual production capacity exceeding 10 million pairs
- 500+ cooperative clients worldwide
- 3 proprietary brands covering all children's age groups
- Modern factory with full production chain
- Eco-friendly and breathable materials
- Strict quality control standards
